reviews.review_title: Nice game, but I have a serious request.
reviews.review_description: Hi, I'm MPWvr and I'm coming to you to request to be a mod. There are many rules that monkey monkey players don't follow. And I and everyone else wants them to stop because obviously, that is cheating. like, glitching out of maps, bullying, mean and toxicity. Those are things that you do not want in your game you put hard work in. And I want to stop that from happening and kick them. And stop people from going over the limits of the game and just have fun. Thank you for your time and please put this at consideration.      -MPWvr.

I am sorry that I am asking this but I think I will be good at mod and I will post vids of people doing something bad (like TTTPig) if you want to know I am FLUX2D. I am creative so I can help you with the game. Thx for reading.
